about_content.who_is_text: I am Raseel Mohammed; someone who believes in flexibility as a lifestyle before it's a work style. Like my name, I strive to be like 'flowing water'—adapting to technical challenges to reach the best and simplest solutions.
about_content.passion_text: My main driver is problem-solving. To me, coding is a tool that weaves my thoughts into digital solutions that touch reality and add real value.
about_content.academic_text: A First-Class Honors graduate in Web Development from TVTC. My goal is to use my skills to build integrated tech projects that leave a tangible impact.

projects_content.title: GlowLixir
projects_content.desc: A full-stack web application that analyzes skin types through an interactive questionnaire, providing personalized recommendations using a React frontend and FastAPI backend.

projects_content.title: DashViz
projects_content.desc: A professional platform to upload CSV files and instantly transform them into interactive charts with automated stats.

projects_content.title: StudyPal
projects_content.desc: A student tool featuring a Pomodoro timer, subject management, real-time stats, and notifications.

projects_content.title: CodeSnippet
projects_content.desc: A sleek tool to organize and store code snippets with syntax highlighting, search, and custom tagging.

projects_content.title: KanBan Board
projects_content.desc: An interactive board supporting drag-and-drop, keyboard shortcuts, and dark mode.

projects_content.title: Task Manager
projects_content.desc: A daily task management app with a vibrant neon-inspired interface and data persistence.
